files.name: __init__.py
files.description: Core module - Code-agnostic base classes and utilities.

files.name: base.py
files.description: Abstract base classes for design code implementations.

classes.description: Result of BMD/SFD computation for a beam.

classes.name: StructuralLibError
classes.description: Base exception for all structural_lib_is456 errors.

classes.name: ValidationError
classes.description: Raised when input validation fails.

classes.name: DesignConstraintError
classes.description: Raised when design requirements cannot be satisfied within given constraints.

classes.name: ComplianceError
classes.description: Raised when IS 456:2000 code requirements are not met.

classes.name: ConfigurationError
classes.description: Raised when library is misconfigured or in invalid state.

classes.name: CalculationError
classes.description: Raised when calculation cannot complete due to numerical issues.

classes.name: DimensionError
classes.description: Raised when dimensions are invalid or out of range.

classes.name: MaterialError
classes.description: Raised when material properties are invalid.

classes.name: LoadError
classes.description: Raised when loads are invalid.

classes.name: Severity
classes.description: Error severity levels.

classes.name: DesignError
classes.description: Structured error dataclass for machine-readable error reporting.

functions.description: Factory function to create a DesignError.
